title: Pottu Vaitha Lyrics Idhayam
stanzas:
Pottu Vaitha Song Lyrics Idhayam
#Ilaiyaraaja #KJYesudhas #Vaali

Pottu vaitha
oru vatta nilaa
kulir punnagaiyil
enna thotta nilaa

Pottu vaitha
oru vatta nilaa
kulir punnagaiyil
ennai thotta nilaa

en manadhil
ambu vitta nilaa
idhu etta indru
ennai sutta nilaa

vazhnaaalthorum
dhinam thaan kaadhoram
paadal koorum

Pottu vaitha
oru vatta nilaa
kulir punnagaiyil
ennai thotta nilaa

en manadhil
ambu vitta nilaa
idhu etta indru
ennai sutta nilaa

aaraadha aasaigal
thondrum enai thoondum
aanaalum vaai pesa
anjum indha nenjam

aval paerai naalum
asai podum ullam
aval pogum paadhai
nizhal pola sellum

mounam paadhi
mogam paadhi
ennai kollum ennaalum

Pottu vaitha
oru vatta nilaa
kulir punnagaiyil
ennai thotta nilaa

en manadhil
ambu vitta nilaa
idhu etta indru
ennai sutta nilaa

vazhnaaalthorum
dhinam thaan kaadhoram
paadal koorum

Pottu vaitha
oru vatta nilaa
kulir punnagaiyil
ennai thotta nilaa

yaappoodu seraadho
paattu thamizh paattu
thoppodu seraadho
kaattru pani kaattru

vinathazh pole ingae
kanaa kaanum kaalai
vidai pole angae
nadai podum paavai

ondraai koodum
ondraai paadum
ponnaal ingu ennaalo..

Pottu vaitha
oru vatta nilaa
kulir punnagaiyil
ennai thotta nilaa

en manadhil

idhu etta indru
ennai sutta nilaa

paadal koorum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Pottu Vaitha'?

The song 'Pottu Vaitha' expresses themes of love and longing, beautifully conveyed through its lyrics.

In which movie is 'Pottu Vaitha' featured?

'Pottu Vaitha' is featured in the movie Idhayam.

Who is the singer of 'Pottu Vaitha'?

The song is sung by the legendary K.J. Yesudhas.

Who composed the music for 'Pottu Vaitha'?

The music for 'Pottu Vaitha' was composed by the iconic Ilaiyaraaja.

When was 'Pottu Vaitha' released?

'Pottu Vaitha' was released on September 6, 1991.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Idhayam, the song Pottu Vaitha serves as a poignant expression of love and emotional connection. The lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, beautifully complemented by K.J. Yesudhas's soulful rendition. The composition by Ilaiyaraaja enhances the romantic atmosphere, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. This classic song continues to resonate with audiences, capturing the essence of heartfelt emotions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pottu Vaitha from Idhayam is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voice of K.J. Yesudhas and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of this classic that beautifully intertwines heartfelt lyrics with soothing music.
stanzaMeanings: A round moon touches me in the cool smile of the night.
A round moon touches me in the cool smile of the night.
In my heart, a moon has been placed, today it has set me free.
Every day of life sings a song of love.
A round moon touches me in the cool smile of the night.
In my heart, a moon has been placed, today it has set me free.
Every day of life sings a song of love.
Though desires arise and pull me, my heart remains silent.
Her name brings longing, her path is like a shadow that fades away.
Silence is half love, it can take me away.
A round moon touches me in the cool smile of the night.
In my heart, a moon has been placed, today it has set me free.
Every day of life sings a song of love.
A round moon touches me in the cool smile of the night.
Should songs blend with Tamil, or should the wind and rain blend?
Like a bird, here I see the dawn, like a flower, it walks gracefully.
Together we sing, together we shine, here I am...
A round moon touches me in the cool smile of the night.
In my heart, a moon has been placed, today it has set me free.
Every day of life sings a song of love.
A round moon touches me in the cool smile of the night.
